ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial objectives and protocols */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the trial ended */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the trial is conducted */,
  "trial_design" TEXT /* Description of the trial design */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the trial */,
  "ethics_approval" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if ethics approval has been obtained */,
  "ethics_approval_date" TEXT /* Date when ethics approval was obtained */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial in which the participant is enrolled */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Summary of the participant's medical history */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant was enrolled in the trial */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant withdrew from the trial */,
  "withdrawal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for withdrawal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing the data */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial to which the data belongs */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of data collection */,
  "milliseconds_since_start" REAL /* Milliseconds since the trial start for the data entry */,
  "x_gravity" REAL /* X axis gravity measurement */,
  "y_gravity" REAL /* Y axis gravity measurement */,
  "z_gravity" REAL /* Z axis gravity measurement */,
  "x_gravity_raw" REAL /* Raw X axis gravity measurement */,
  "y_gravity_raw" REAL /* Raw Y axis gravity measurement */,
  "z_gravity_raw" REAL /* Raw Z axis gravity measurement */,
  "delta_time" REAL /* Delta time since the last measurement */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, manual input) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the trial site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for site inquiries */,
  "site_director" TEXT /* Name of the site director */,
  "site_phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the site */,
  "site_email" TEXT /* Additional contact email for the site */,
  "site_address" TEXT /* Address of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role within the system */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user communication */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated data entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Value before the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audit_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_audit_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES trial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., ongoing, completed, suspended) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last status update */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "status_changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_status_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_status_status_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("status_changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial in which the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the significant event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., enrollment, adverse event) */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
